subject: Zoom sign-in button grayed out
description: User opens Zoom; cannot click Sign In; SSO path unavailable from UI.

ts_steps.title: Switch account type
ts_steps.action: Sign In → ensure not stuck on 'Join a meeting' only view; use SSO domain field if provided.

ts_steps.title: Clear credentials
ts_steps.action: Sign out everywhere from zoom.us profile if accessible; remove stale credentials from Windows Credential Manager for Zoom.

internal_information: Corrupt install or policy-restricted SSO. If SSO only and grayed, compare with working machine registry/policy.
